about.title: Engineering Elegance In Every Byte.
about.description: As a Computer Engineering student at Holy Angel University, I specialize in bridging complex backend logic with calm, intuitive interfaces. My focus lies in developing scalable B2B SaaS platforms and integrating AI-driven predictive models into real-world applications.
